next_action.message:
**Subject: Action Required – Claim CLM-004 | Marcus Thompson**

Dear Marcus,

Thank you for submitting your claim. We're currently reviewing **Claim CLM-004** and want to ensure everything moves forward as smoothly as possible. We've identified two items that need your attention before we can proceed.

**1. Vehicle Identification Number (VIN)**
The VIN listed across your submitted documents — *5YJ3E1EA7K* — appears to be incomplete. A valid VIN must be exactly 17 characters. To correctly identify your 2022 Tesla Model 3 in our system, please provide the full, correct 17-character VIN. You can typically find this on your vehicle registration, insurance card, or on the dashboard near the windshield.

**2. Settlement Amount Pending**
Your settlement breakdown currently shows the Net Insurance Payout and Actual Cash Value as *"TBD – pending."* The final settlement figure is still being determined. Once your insurer confirms the Actual Cash Value, a finalized settlement statement will be needed to complete your claim.

Please reply to this email or upload the updated documents through our secure customer portal at your earliest convenience. Our team is here to help — don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Warm regards,
**Claims Support Team**
